title: sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat
description:
This is a continuation of sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat. In the current window, the SM persona produced two back-to-back failed runs at 2026-05-29T01:12:50.865340+00:00 and 2026-05-29T01:12:50.881044+00:00 with explicit error text stating `json parse failed` after `finish_reason=length`. The error names a factory-side output truncation condition rather than a story-specific domain bug, and it matches the same pattern seen in prior concerns earlier in the night.

The immediate operational impact in this burst was limited because the SM sequence recovered within seconds with a subsequent successful SM run at 2026-05-29T01:12:50.895751+00:00. However, this is now repeated evidence across multiple L2 intervals of the same persona hitting length-truncation and then failing JSON parsing, which indicates an unstable control path for structured SM output. The separate dev failure on story 18 (`tests not green after run`) is present in the same window but does not share this diagnostic clarity and does not change the SM pattern.

A secondary signal in the watcher note is growing cleanup drift: orphan-like missing-DB worktrees increased again, with a new worktree created for story 56. That observation is not the main concern here because the current escalation is driven by the clearer and repeated SM truncation failure class. The available evidence supports a focused concern on repeated structured-output truncation, with the factory otherwise continuing to run.

evidence.summary_excerpt: This minute had one more ambiguous dev failure on story 18 (`tests not green after run`) plus two immediate `sm` failures where the error text explicitly says the model output was truncated at `finish_reason=length`, causing JSON parse failure.

evidence.excerpt: persona=sm success=false attempt_n=800 error="json parse failed at max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 9 (char 8)" tokens_out=122880 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat

persona=sm success=false attempt_n=801 error="json parse failed at max_tokens=8192 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 7 (char 6)" tokens_out=20 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat
persona=sm success=true attempt_n=802 tokens_in=10 tokens_out=20 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat

{"noteworthy":"Three failures: one more ambiguous story-18 dev failure (`tests not green after run`) and two `sm` failures whose error text clearly identifies output truncation at `finish_reason=length`, a diagnosable factory-side issue."}
{"noteworthy":"No formal retry storm threshold hit, but `sm` failed twice back-to-back in one burst with the same truncation pattern."}
{"noteworthy":"Orphan-like missing-DB worktrees increased from two to three with new story 56 added; story 33 remains an active worktree."}

escalation_reason: Repeated SM structured-output truncation has persisted across multiple watcher-note intervals, now including two consecutive failures at 2026-05-29T01:12:50Z with explicit `finish_reason=length` / JSON-parse errors. L3 judgment is needed because the pattern is clearly factory-side, recurring rather than isolated, and prior warn-level concern `sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat` has not resolved.
